overall.description: Exploration of the Temple of Hades in a game engine (Assassin's Creed Odyssey), moving from the flower-adorned interior shrine room to the sunlit exterior courtyard overlooking the coast, showcasing classical Greek architecture with Ionic columns, ceremonial altars, and coastal vistas.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior shrine room with ceremonial altar and floral decorations

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the interior shrine room, examining the flower arrangements, ceremonial altar, and wall murals

entered.detail: faded red and blue painted murals depicting figures on the ceiling
warm reddish stone block walls with marble wainscoting
long wooden planter box filled with purple and pink flowers
ornate carved stone table with scrolls, sandals, and ceremonial items
large round terracotta basin filled with water
circular metal shield hanging on the wall above the altar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dimly lit shrine room with warm reddish stone walls and painted ceiling murals. The camera pans slowly around the space, revealing a ceremonial stone altar adorned with scrolls, sandals, and flower wreaths, alongside wooden planters filled with purple blooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance portico transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: exits the interior shrine room through large wooden doors into the sunlit exterior courtyard
bright golden sunlight floods the view as camera emerges from the dim interior space

agents.ego_description: walking out of the temple interior through the tall wooden doors into the columned courtyard

notable_agents.action: temple visitor in dark robes walking away from the entrance toward the courtyard

entered.detail: tall carved wooden doors opening to the exterior
sunlit courtyard with geometric stone tile paving
massive fluted stone columns supporting the temple portico
stone planter box with blooming purple flowers
game interface text panel describing the Temple of Hades
purple fabric awning with gold fringe over a side area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the large wooden doors, transitioning from the dim interior to a bright sunlit portico with massive stone columns. A purple canopy and flower planters adorn the courtyard while an NPC walks ahead, and an information panel about the Temple of Hades appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside terrace with coastal overlook and ceremonial braziers

events.description: moves from the columned courtyard to the cliff edge revealing the ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard toward the cliff edge to view the coastal landscape and distant town

notable_agents.action: figure standing at the cliff edge looking out at the ocean view

entered.detail: mature tree with gnarled trunk casting long shadows
stone retaining wall at the edge of a high cliff
expansive view of the sea with sunlight reflecting on water
distant settlement visible along the coastline
elevated stone platform with lit braziers

segments.scene_description: Walking past the purple canopy and olive trees, the camera approaches the cliff edge revealing a stunning coastal vista. The sun sets over the water, illuminating the distant town and mountains, while stone braziers burn on the terrace and a lone figure stands at the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exterior perimeter with classical portico and terrace statues

events.description: camera turns to face the grand temple portico with towering Ionic columns
approaches the stone terrace with the large wrestler statue and burning brazier

agents.ego_description: circulating around the temple exterior to examine the classical architecture, front portico, and terrace sculptures

entered.detail: grand entrance with triangular pediment and carved frieze
tall fluted columns with ornate capitals supporting the portico
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the side path
large decorative urn on a pedestal with trailing plants
classical bronze statue of two wrestlers on a stone plinth

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around to face the magnificent temple portico with its towering Ionic columns and carved pediment. Moving along the side terrace lined with cypress trees and stone urns, the camera approaches a classical wrestler statue silhouetted against the golden sky, with distant mountains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit interior of a shrine into a sprawling, sun-drenched classical courtyard overlooking the coast. It begins inside a room of reddish stone and painted murals, panning across a ceremonial altar adorned with scrolls and purple flowers. As the camera moves through large wooden doors, the dim interior gives way to a bright portico defined by massive stone columns and a purple canopy. The scene then expands past olive trees toward the cliff's edge, where the lighting shifts to a golden sunset illuminating a distant town and mountains across the water. Finally, the camera circles back to face the towering Ionic columns of the temple portico, gliding along a terrace of cypress trees and stone urns toward a silhouetted wrestler statue against the glowing horizon.
